TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ApiManagementService extends Azure.Provisioning.Primitives.ProvisionableResource

Docs.summary: ApiManagementService.

MemberSignature.Value: public ApiManagementService (string bicepIdentifier, string? resourceVersion = default);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string bicepIdentifier, string resourceVersion) cil managed
Public Sub New (bicepIdentifier As String, Optional resourceVersion As String = Nothing)

Docs.param: The the Bicep identifier name of the ApiManagementService resource. This can be used to refer to the resource in expressions, but is not the Azure name of the resource. This value can contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
Docs.summary: Creates a new ApiManagementService.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property AdditionalLocations As BicepList(Of AdditionalLocation)

Docs.summary: Additional datacenter locations of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Certificates As BicepList(Of CertificateConfiguration)

Docs.summary: List of Certificates that need to be installed in the API Management service. Max supported certificates that can be installed is 10.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CreatedAtUtc As BicepValue(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: Creation UTC date of the API Management service.The date conforms to the following format: `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ` as specified by the ISO 8601 standard.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property CustomProperties As BicepDictionary(Of String)

Docs.summary: Custom properties of the API Management service.</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Ciphers.TripleDes168` will disable the cipher TLS_RSA_WITH_3DES_EDE_CBC_SHA for all TLS(1.0, 1.1 and 1.2).</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Protocols.Tls11` can be used to disable just TLS 1.1.</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Protocols.Tls10` can be used to disable TLS 1.0 on an API Management service.</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Backend.Protocols.Tls11` can be used to disable just TLS 1.1 for communications with backends.</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Backend.Protocols.Tls10` can be used to disable TLS 1.0 for communications with backends.</br>Setting `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Protocols.Server.Http2` can be used to enable HTTP2 protocol on an API Management service.</br>Not specifying any of these properties on PATCH operation will reset omitted properties' values to their defaults. For all the settings except Http2 the default value is `True` if the service was created on or before April 1, 2018 and `False` otherwise. Http2 setting's default value is `False`.</br></br>You can disable any of the following ciphers by using settings `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Ciphers.[cipher_name]`: TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA, TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA, TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA, TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA, TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256, TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA256, TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256, TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA, TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA. For example, `Microsoft.WindowsAzure.ApiManagement.Gateway.Security.Ciphers.TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256`:`false`. The default value is `true` for them.</br> Note: The following ciphers can't be disabled since they are required by internal platform components: TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA256.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig virtual instance void DefineProvisionableProperties() cil managed

Docs.summary: Define all the provisionable properties of ApiManagementService.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DeveloperPortalStatus As BicepValue(Of DeveloperPortalStatus)

Docs.summary: Status of developer portal in this API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DeveloperPortalUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: DEveloper Portal endpoint URL of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property DisableGateway As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.DisableGateway : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Property only valid for an Api Management service deployed in multiple locations. This can be used to disable the gateway in master region.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property EnableClientCertificate As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.EnableClientCertificate : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Property only meant to be used for Consumption SKU Service. This enforces a client certificate to be presented on each request to the gateway. This also enables the ability to authenticate the certificate in the policy on the gateway.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ETag As BicepValue(Of ETag)

Docs.summary: ETag of the resource.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.Provisioning.ApiManagement.ApiManagementService FromExisting (string bicepIdentifier, string? resourceVersion = default);
.method public static hidebysig class Azure.Provisioning.ApiManagement.ApiManagementService FromExisting(string bicepIdentifier, string resourceVersion) cil managed
Public Shared Function FromExisting (bicepIdentifier As String, Optional resourceVersion As String = Nothing) As ApiManagementService

Docs.param: The the Bicep identifier name of the ApiManagementService resource. This can be used to refer to the resource in expressions, but is not the Azure name of the resource. This value can contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
Docs.summary: Creates a reference to an existing ApiManagementService.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property GatewayRegionalUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: Gateway URL of the API Management service in the Default Region.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property GatewayUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: Gateway URL of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property HostnameConfigurations As BicepList(Of HostnameConfiguration)

Docs.summary: Custom hostname configuration of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Id As BicepValue(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: Gets the Id.
Managed service identity of the Api Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property LegacyApi As BicepValue(Of LegacyApiState)

Docs.summary: Indication whether or not the legacy Configuration API (v1) should be exposed on the API Management service. Value is optional but must be 'Enabled' or 'Disabled'. If 'Disabled', legacy Configuration API (v1) will not be available for self-hosted gateways. Default value is 'Enabled'.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property LegacyPortalStatus As BicepValue(Of LegacyPortalStatus)

Docs.summary: Status of legacy portal in the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Location As BicepValue(Of AzureLocation)

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the Location.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ManagementApiUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: Management API endpoint URL of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property MinApiVersion As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.MinApiVersion : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: Limit control plane API calls to API Management service with version equal to or newer than this value.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Name As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.Name : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: The name of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property NatGatewayState As BicepValue(Of ApiManagementNatGatewayState)

Docs.summary: Property can be used to enable NAT Gateway for this API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property NotificationSenderEmail As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.NotificationSenderEmail : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: Email address from which the notification will be sent.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property OutboundPublicIPAddresses As BicepList(Of String)

Docs.summary: Outbound public IPV4 address prefixes associated with NAT Gateway deployed service. Available only for Premium SKU on stv2 platform.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PlatformVersion As BicepValue(Of PlatformVersion)

Docs.summary: Compute Platform Version running the service in this location.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PortalUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: Publisher portal endpoint Url of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PrivateEndpointConnections As BicepList(Of RemotePrivateEndpointConnectionWrapper)

Docs.summary: List of Private Endpoint Connections of this service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PrivateIPAddresses As BicepList(Of IPAddress)

Docs.summary: Private Static Load Balanced IP addresses of the API Management service in Primary region which is deployed in an Internal Virtual Network. Available only for Basic, Standard, Premium and Isolated SKU.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ProvisioningState As BicepValue(Of String)

Docs.summary: The current provisioning state of the API Management service which can be one of the following: Created/Activating/Succeeded/Updating/Failed/Stopped/Terminating/TerminationFailed/Deleted.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PublicIPAddresses As BicepList(Of IPAddress)

Docs.summary: Public Static Load Balanced IP addresses of the API Management service in Primary region. Available only for Basic, Standard, Premium and Isolated SKU.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublicIPAddressId As BicepValue(Of ResourceIdentifier)

Docs.summary: Public Standard SKU IP V4 based IP address to be associated with Virtual Network deployed service in the region. Supported only for Developer and Premium SKU being deployed in Virtual Network.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublicNetworkAccess As BicepValue(Of PublicNetworkAccess)

Docs.summary: Whether or not public endpoint access is allowed for this API Management service. Value is optional but if passed in, must be 'Enabled' or 'Disabled'. If 'Disabled', private endpoints are the exclusive access method. Default value is 'Enabled'.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublisherEmail As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.PublisherEmail : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: Publisher email.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublisherName As BicepValue(Of String)
member this.PublisherName : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: Publisher name.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Restore As BicepValue(Of Boolean)
member this.Restore : Azure.Provisioning.BicepValue<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Undelete Api Management Service if it was previously soft-deleted. If this flag is specified and set to True all other properties will be ignored.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ScmUri As BicepValue(Of Uri)

Docs.summary: SCM endpoint URL of the API Management service.
SKU properties of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SystemData As SystemData

Docs.summary: Gets the SystemData.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Tags As BicepDictionary(Of String)

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the Tags.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property TargetProvisioningState As BicepValue(Of String)

Docs.summary: The provisioning state of the API Management service, which is targeted by the long running operation started on the service.
Virtual network configuration of the API Management service.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property VirtualNetworkType As BicepValue(Of VirtualNetworkType)

Docs.summary: The type of VPN in which API Management service needs to be configured in. None (Default Value) means the API Management service is not part of any Virtual Network, External means the API Management deployment is set up inside a Virtual Network having an Internet Facing Endpoint, and Internal means that API Management deployment is setup inside a Virtual Network having an Intranet Facing Endpoint only.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Zones As BicepList(Of String)
member this.Zones : Azure.Provisioning.BicepList<string> with get, set

Docs.summary: A list of availability zones denoting where the resource needs to come from.
